title: Member information: Jennifer Johnson, MLA Lacombe-Ponoka, 31st Legislature
notes: Tier 1 primary for EVT-114. Legislative Assembly record confirms Johnson was elected May 29 2023 for Lacombe-Ponoka (31st Legislature), was subsequently seated in the UCP caucus (contradicting Smith's 'final' statement), later resigned from caucus, and was later readmitted. URL needs HTTP check; record may update over time. Archive recommended.
verification_notes: Verified 2026-06-18. Re EVT-114. Timeline anchor: subject sat as Independent from 2023-05-30 to 2024-10-09. Use these in-body dates as event anchors, not the publication date.
